recipes.name: Hot Apple Cider Moonshine
recipes.seoTitle: Hot Apple Cider Moonshine Recipe | Montucky Moonshine
recipes.metaDescription: Hot apple cider spiked with moonshine, cinnamon, and star anise. The ultimate campfire warmer from Montana.

socialCopy.instagram: The fire's lit. The cider's hot. The moonshine just walked in. Hot Apple Cider Moonshine — the campfire drink that turns October nights into memories.
socialCopy.facebook: Cold night? Warm up with our Hot Apple Cider Moonshine. Hot cider, moonshine, cinnamon, and star anise. Recipe on the site.
socialCopy.twitter: Hot apple cider + moonshine + cinnamon = the only fall drink you need. Recipe:

recipes.name: Campfire Hot Toddy
recipes.seoTitle: Campfire Hot Toddy Recipe | Montucky Moonshine
recipes.metaDescription: The Campfire Hot Toddy — moonshine, honey, lemon, and spices. A Montana campfire essential.

socialCopy.instagram: Under the pines, around the fire. This isn't your grandmother's toddy — it's a Montana campfire toddy. Moonshine. Honey. Lemon. Warmth.
socialCopy.facebook: Campfire Hot Toddy — the drink that makes every cold night better. Moonshine, honey, lemon, cinnamon. Simple and perfect.
socialCopy.twitter: Moonshine + honey + lemon + campfire = the Campfire Hot Toddy. Recipe:

recipes.seoTitle: Spiked Hot Chocolate with Moonshine | Montucky Moonshine
recipes.metaDescription: Rich hot chocolate spiked with moonshine, topped with whipped cream and marshmallows. Winter perfection.

recipes.seoTitle: S'mores Moonshine Cocktail Recipe | Montucky Moonshine
recipes.metaDescription: S'mores Moonshine — chocolate, marshmallow, graham cracker, and moonshine. Campfire dessert in a glass.

recipes.name: Moonshine Lemonade
recipes.metaDescription: Moonshine Lemonade — tart citrus, sweet simple syrup, and smooth moonshine. The ultimate summer refresher.

socialCopy.instagram: Sun's out, shine's out. Moonshine Lemonade — fresh-squeezed lemonade meets Montana moonshine. Best served riverside in a mason jar.
socialCopy.facebook: Nothing says summer like Moonshine Lemonade. 3 ingredients, 5 minutes, and the whole afternoon ahead of you. Recipe on the site.
socialCopy.twitter: Moonshine + lemonade = the only summer drink recipe you need. Get it:
